summary: Full e2e testing of TummyProfile v3 (centered modal) on /dine page. All 12 feature requirements verified. 10/10 backend tests passing. The key structural change from v2 (right-side drawer) to v3 (centered modal) is confirmed working: backdrop uses display:flex + alignItems:center + justifyContent:center. Modal panel is position:static (NOT fixed right:0). All modal functionality preserved from v2.

minor.issue: Same as iterations 141-142: 'dine' context falls through to default weight-based sorting, no dine-specific food prioritization. Works correctly in practice.

ui_bugs.issue: Mojo shows only 2 Mira Imagines cards (Balanced Wholesome Bowl for Indie breed + Chicken-Free Complete Meal for allergy). The loves-based cards are filtered out because Mojo's favorite_protein='Chicken' matches the allergy. Pre-existing data issue from iteration_141/142.

integration_issues.issue: Console error '[DineSoulPage] products fetch error: TypeError: Failed to fetch' appears on load (pre-existing issue). Page gracefully falls back to hardcoded DINE_DIMS catalog.

design_issues.screen: TummyProfile modal - question card grid with odd number of cards
issues: After answering 1 question, 3 remaining cards show as 2 in row 1 + 1 alone in row 2. Minor asymmetry but not a bug - expected grid behavior.

features_verified.compact_bar_renders: ✅ PASS — [data-testid='tummy-profile'] renders on /dine with allergy chips (✗ chicken), loves chips (♥ Chicken), 'Mira's picks →'
features_verified.centered_modal_structure: ✅ PASS — Backdrop: position=fixed, inset=0, display=flex, alignItems=center, justifyContent=center, zIndex=1000. Panel: position=static (NOT fixed right:0). Confirms CENTERED modal, not right-side drawer.
features_verified.modal_header_content: ✅ PASS — '✦ GROW MOJO'S TUMMY PROFILE' / '✦ GROW TESTSCORING'S TUMMY PROFILE' heading visible. Big score % at 72px font size.
features_verified.progress_bar_pink_purple: ✅ PASS — Height=5px, background=linear-gradient(90deg, #FF2D87, #C44DFF) — pink to purple gradient fills to score width
features_verified.backdrop_click_closes: ✅ PASS — Clicking left side of backdrop (outside modal) closes the modal
features_verified.inside_click_no_close: ✅ PASS — Clicking inside modal does NOT close it (stopPropagation working)
features_verified.question_cards_dark_purple: ✅ PASS — linear-gradient(135deg, rgb(26,6,32) 0%, rgb(45,10,0) 100%) = #1A0620 → #2d0a00 confirmed on question cards
features_verified.question_cards_2col_grid: ✅ PASS — gridTemplateColumns='355px 355px' (2-column grid at 780px modal width)
features_verified.mira_imagines_section: ✅ PASS — 'Mira Imagines for [PetName]' section shown with breed-relevant card (Joint Support Blend for TestScoring, Balanced Wholesome Bowl for Mojo/Indie)
features_verified.mira_imagines_badge: ✅ PASS — 'Mira Imagines' badge with pink-to-orange gradient (linear-gradient(135deg, #FF2D87, #FF8C42)) on each food card
features_verified.request_a_quote_button: ✅ PASS — 'Request a Quote →' button on each Mira Imagines card
features_verified.live_score_update: ✅ PASS — Answering 'Very comfortable - no issues' on 'How comfortable is TestScoring at the vet?' (+5pts) → score updated 11% → 14% in modal header. '1 answer saved · +5 pts' banner shown in green.
features_verified.high_score_pet_no_questions: ✅ PASS — Mojo (score=94%) shows DineSoulQuestionsSection returns null (0 unanswered questions); only Mira Imagines section shown

action_items: LOW: Update Mojo's pet data to restore correct loves (Salmon, PeanutButter) so the Mira Imagines section shows 3-4 cards instead of 2. Current data has favorite_protein='Chicken' same as allergy.
MINOR: Consider adding dine-specific food prioritization to quick-questions backend for context=dine (pre-existing from iteration_141/142)
critical_code_review_comments: TummyProfile v3 CORRECTLY implements centered modal: backdrop uses display:flex+alignItems:center+justifyContent:center. Panel is position:static (not fixed right:0). This is the key change from v2 right-side drawer.
Backdrop inset:0 with right:0 is correct full-screen overlay behavior — NOT a right-side panel. The panel centering is via flex layout.
generateFoodImagines: correctly handles Mojo (allergy=chicken) — allergySet filters out loves items that match allergy. Only generates non-allergy cards.
DineSoulQuestionsSection: correctly returns null when Mojo has 0 unanswered questions (score=94%, all answered).
Score update flow: answer → POST /api/pet-soul/profile/{id}/answer → onAnswered callback → setLiveScore() → score span updates in header. Live update working correctly.
2-column grid uses repeat(2, 1fr) rendering as 355px 355px at 780px-wide modal. Correct layout.

test_credentials.pet_testscoring: pet-testscoring-0faaab3d (score=14% after 2 answers submitted in this iteration)

seed_data_creation: 2 answers submitted for TestScoring during testing (score moved from 11% to 14%)
context_for_next_testing_agent: TummyProfile v3 (centered modal) fully verified. Key change from v2: backdrop=display:flex centered, panel=position:static (not fixed right:0). All functionality working: score updates, question cards (dark purple gradient), Mira Imagines cards, backdrop/close button. Pet switch via petChanged custom event works (need localStorage tdb_auth_token for fetch). TestScoring pet score is now ~14% (was 11% in iter_142). Mojo score still 94%.
